title: 60-Second Lead Response for SaaS Companies
metaDescription: Done-for-you 60-second lead response for SaaS companies. Every trial signup or demo request gets a personal reply in under a minute, in your voice.
excerpt: Every demo request and trial signup answered in under 60 seconds, in your voice, with your booking link. The wedge install of the Ayothedoc AIOS for SaaS.

sections.intro:
If you run a SaaS company, you already know the math. A demo request answered in under a minute converts at multiples of one answered in an hour, and a trial signup that sits cold for a day is usually a lost account. Yet most founders and heads of growth still play catch-up. Sales is in meetings, marketing is in a sprint, and the inbound form sits unanswered while the prospect compares you to three competitors who replied first.

The Ayothedoc AI Operating System fixes this with a wedge install called the 60-Second Lead Engine. Every new lead, whether it is a demo request, a trial signup, a pricing page form, or a partner inquiry, gets a personal reply in under 60 seconds. The reply sounds like you, references what they asked for, and offers a clear next step with your booking link. You keep doing your work. The system answers the door.
sections.fourCFit:
This page covers the Capabilities layer of the AIOS. Capabilities are the done-for-you workflows that actually do the work, in this case drafting and sending the first reply. To run cleanly, this capability leans on the other three layers:

  • Context: your product positioning, ICP, pricing posture, and the tone you use in sales emails.
  • Connections: your inbox, CRM, form provider, and calendar, so the system reads new leads and writes replies from live data.
  • Cadence: a 24/7 watcher that triggers within seconds of a new lead, including nights and weekends.
  • Capabilities (this page): the reply itself, the routing, and the handoff into your pipeline.
sections.whatDoneLooksLike:
When the install is finished, here is the concrete artifact you own:

  • A live lead watcher on every inbound source: demo forms, trial signups, pricing inquiries, and shared inbox addresses.
  • A reply that goes out in under 60 seconds, written in your voice, referencing the specific request and including your booking link.
  • Routing rules that flag enterprise-shaped leads (work email, team size, domain signals) to a human rep before sending.
  • A CRM record created or updated for every lead, with source, message body, and reply attached.
  • A daily digest at a time you choose, showing every lead, the reply sent, and whether they booked.
  • A simple kill switch and an edit panel for the reply templates, owned by you.
sections.howWeInstall:
The install runs in three phases. No long discovery deck, no SOW theater.

  1. Audit (free, about 10 minutes): we look at your current lead sources, average response time, and where leads fall through. You walk away with a written diagnosis whether or not you hire us. Run the audit.
  2. Install (10 business days): we wire the watchers, write the reply patterns in your voice, connect your CRM and calendar, and ship the daily digest. You approve the templates before anything goes live.
  3. Operate (ongoing): we run the system, monitor reply quality, and add one new automation per week to the AIOS. See plans.
sections.expectedResults:
Grounded ranges based on what SaaS teams typically see after the wedge goes live:

  • First-response time drops from hours or days to under 60 seconds on 95% or more of inbound leads.
  • Demo booking rate from inbound forms increases by 20% to 60%, depending on your current baseline.
  • Sales reps reclaim 5 to 10 hours per week previously spent on first-touch email.
  • Lead-to-opportunity time compresses by 1 to 3 days because the calendar invite goes out on the same visit.
  • Standing guarantee: across the full AIOS, you recover 40 or more hours a month, or we keep working free until you do.
sections.faq:
Will the replies sound like a bot?

No. We write the patterns in your voice using your existing sales emails as reference, and you approve every template before it ships. Prospects reply to these threads the same way they reply to a human SDR.

What about enterprise leads where a templated reply would hurt?

We set routing rules during install. Enterprise-shaped leads, based on signals you define, get flagged for a human rep and held from auto-reply, or sent a softer holding note that buys your team time to respond personally.

Do you lock us into specific tools?

No. The AIOS is tool-agnostic. We work with the CRM, inbox, form provider, and calendar you already use. You own the system and the credentials. If you ever want to walk away, you keep everything.
